commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 2 Chronicles 23:5 And a third part shall be at the king's house; and a third part at the gate of the foundation: and all the people shall be in the courts of the house of the LORD. To the sabbath. That is, to perform in your weeks the functions of your office, or the weekly watches. (Challoner) Porters. Septuagint, "even to the entrance gates. " House, where Athalia resided, or in the apartments of Joas in the temple. Septuagint, "middle. "Syriac, "of the cooks, or guards. "(Haydock) It led from the palace up the steps, ver. (Menochius) Perhaps it was also called Sur, 4 Kings. This seems to be transposed out of its place from ver.

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: To the sabbath: That is, to perform in your weeks the functions of your office, or the weekly watches.
